title: Slovakian Potato Dumplings
description: A hearty, rustic Slovakian dish featuring potato dumplings served with a savory sauce.
instructions: Combine grated potatoes, flour, eggs, and sour cream in a bowl. Mix well.
Knead the mixture for 5 minutes until it forms a dough.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each into a dumpling.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the dumplings for 10-12 minutes, or until they float.
While the dumplings are cooking, melt butter in a pan over medium heat.
Add a pinch of salt to the melted butter and stir.
Serve the cooked dumplings with the butter sauce and enjoy!
